proposition_1_under_true_scm.claim: Under SCM with no T->Y edge, DoWhy must declare zero causal effect.
proposition_1_under_true_scm.estimand_text:
No directed path from ['T'] to ['Y'] in the causal graph.
Causal effect is zero.

theorem_1_2_under_hypothetical_scm.claim: If T->Y were added, the backdoor adjustment set would be {L,X,C}.
theorem_1_2_under_hypothetical_scm.estimand_text_excerpt:
Estimand type: EstimandType.NONPARAMETRIC_ATE

d[T]            
Estimand assumption 1, Unconfoundedness: If U→{T} and U→Y then P(Y|T,C,L,X,U) = P(Y|T,C,L,X)

sanity_estimate_under_hypothetical_scm.note: DGP has zero causal effect of T on Y; estimate via backdoor adjustment on hypothetical T->Y SCM should be near zero.
